concerns.detail: Describes a specific graduated student with identifying details including current employer (Shanghai AI Lab), physical appearance (lifeless eyes), and mental state (dazed), which could de-anonymize the individual.
concerns.excerpt: 认识一个在他手下毕业的学生两眼无神在上海ailab浑浑噩噩度日

concerns.detail: References a specific student incident at CUHK CSE department with enough detail (graduation dispute widely known in department) to potentially identify the individual.
